name: Athasian Half-Giant
description: Humanoid. Large. Athasian half-giants tower over most folk and require twice as much food and water as a Medium creature each day. Your reach is 5 feet. Giant Ancestry: when you hit a Large or smaller creature with an attack roll and deal damage, you can knock that target Prone a number of times equal to your Proficiency Bonus per Long Rest. Large Form: you have advantage on Strength checks. Powerful Build: you have advantage on ability checks made to end the Grappled condition.
